mapper.select: SELECT FROM expenses WHERE project_id = #{project_id} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO expenses (project_id, item_name, amount, created_at) VALUES (#{project_id}, #{item_name}, #{amount}, NOW())

INSERT INTO expenses (project_id, item_name, amount, created_at) VALUES
(#{exp.project_id}, #{exp.item_name}, #{exp.amount}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE expenses
item_name = #{item_name},
amount = #{amount},
WHERE id = #{id}
